overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a player walking through a sunlit industrial wasteland area. The journey begins near burning tire piles, continues along a paved road with passing vehicles and electrical substations, and ends with an encounter with an armed NPC wearing a distinctive red helmet.

events.description: moving away from burning tire pile and onto the paved road
beginning steady forward walk along the road shoulder

agents.ego_description: moving away from the burning barrels and heading toward the open road

entered.detail: pile of tires burning with thick black smoke
tall cylindrical structure with colorful advertisements rotating on top
cluster of industrial structures and smokestacks
overhead electrical wires crossing the scene

segments.scene_description: The segment opens near a burning pile of tires emitting black smoke, then moves onto a gravel shoulder alongside a road. The large circular billboard tower dominates the center distance while industrial buildings line the left side under a clear blue sky.

events.description: green military-style truck passes by on the right side of the road
silver sedan overtakes from behind and moves ahead on the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the road shoulder as various vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: green military truck driving past on the road
silver sedan overtaking and accelerating ahead

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers along the roadside
metal fencing running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: Walking along the asphalt road through the industrial district, passing red and white barriers on the left. Vehicles including a green military truck and silver sedan pass by on the right. The circular billboard tower moves to the right side as the camera progresses forward.

events.description: turning left at the intersection to follow the road alongside the electrical substation
approaching the red armored vehicle parked near the substation fence

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing to walk alongside the high-voltage substation fencing

notable_agents.action: red armored vehicle with covered cargo bed parked by the roadside

entered.detail: high voltage towers and electrical equipment behind chain-link fencing
elevated highway or bridge structure spanning the background
heavy-duty red vehicle with armored plating and covered bed

segments.scene_description: Turning left at an intersection to walk alongside a large electrical substation with towering metal structures and power lines. The road becomes narrower with fencing on both sides. A red armored vehicle is parked ahead near an overpass bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift camp under overpass near substation

events.description: leaving paved road and entering dirt ground area near the parked vehicle
approaching armed NPC wearing red helmet and tactical gear holding rifle

agents.ego_description: approaching the armed character standing guard near equipment and crates under the overpass

notable_agents.action: armed character wearing red helmet and black tactical gear holding an assault rifle, standing guard

entered.detail: stacked containers and technical equipment near the building wall
orange and white striped barriers near the fence line

segments.scene_description: Leaving the paved road to walk on dirt ground toward a makeshift camp under the overpass. The red armored vehicle is now parked in the background to the left. The camera approaches an armed NPC wearing a distinctive red helmet and tactical gear who stands guard near equipment crates, ending with a close-up of the character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit industrial wasteland that transitions from an open road into a guarded makeshift camp. It begins beside a burning pile of tires emitting black smoke, moving from a gravel shoulder onto an asphalt road dominated by a distant circular billboard tower and industrial buildings under a clear blue sky. As the camera progresses forward, the billboard shifts to the right while red and white barriers line the left and vehicles, including a green military truck, pass by. The scene then turns left at an intersection to follow a narrow road flanked by fencing and the towering metal structures of an electrical substation, leading toward a distant overpass bridge. Finally, the camera leaves the pavement for dirt ground, passing a parked red armored vehicle to approach an armed guard in a red helmet and tactical gear standing near equipment crates.
